goals.description: Finish my own share (currently at 79%) and send a quick, low-pressure text to teammate_A saying 'Hey, just wanted to say I'm done with mine so you can tackle yours whenever fits best!' then immediately go scroll for an hour.

Just wrapping up mine lets me slide away guilt-free while keeping the peace. The text is vague enough to be supportive but not demanding.
